data.title: Anchorage Digital Expands Atlas Platform to Include Collateral Management Services
data.description: Anchorage Digital has announced the expansion of its Atlas platform to offer collateral management and oversight services for institutional clients. According to BlockBeats, the platform will cater to institutional lenders and credit providers, offering 24/7 real-time collateral monitoring and automated margin call notifications. These services are designed for a wide range of digital asset-backed transactions, including secured loans, convertible bonds, warehouse financing, structured products, OTC derivatives, equipment purchases, and PIPE financing.

data.title: Bitcoin Transfer to Jump Crypto Observed
data.description: At 07:03, a total of 49.4 BTC was transferred from several anonymous addresses to Jump Crypto. According to ChainCatcher, this transaction was tracked using Arkham data, highlighting the movement of significant Bitcoin assets. The transfer underscores the ongoing activity within the cryptocurrency market, where large transactions are frequently monitored for insights into market trends and behaviors.

data.title: Survey Reveals Low Trust in Political Leaders Among Federal Workers
data.description: A recent survey conducted by the Partnership for Public Service indicates that only 10% of federal employees who participated expressed confidence in their agencies' political leaders. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the survey's findings, which underscore a significant trust deficit within federal institutions. The survey results suggest a need for improved leadership and communication within these agencies to enhance trust and morale among federal workers.

data.title: Studio Dominates Academy Awards with Top Films
data.description: Bloomberg posted on X that the studio responsible for distributing the two films that won the most Academy Awards this year has emerged as a dominant force in the industry. The studio's success highlights its strategic prowess in selecting and promoting films that resonate with both critics and audiences. This achievement underscores the studio's influential role in shaping cinematic trends and its ability to consistently deliver award-winning content. The recognition at the Academy Awards further solidifies the studio's reputation as a leader in the film distribution sector.

data.title: AI Technology Diversion to China Leads to Charges in New York
data.description: Three individuals have been charged in New York for allegedly attempting to illegally transfer billions of dollars' worth of artificial intelligence technology from a U.S.-based manufacturer to China. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the seriousness of the charges, which underscore ongoing concerns about technology theft and national security. The case reflects broader tensions between the U.S. and China over technological advancements and intellectual property rights. Authorities are intensifying efforts to prevent unauthorized technology transfers that could compromise national interests.

data.title: Crypto Market Decline Continues as Federal Reserve Holds Rates Steady
data.description: The cryptocurrency market experienced further declines, with the total market capitalization decreasing by 1.5% to $2.48 trillion. According to NS3.AI, this downturn followed the Federal Reserve's decision to maintain interest rates and raise its 2026 PCE inflation forecast. Bitcoin's price hovered around $70,000, marking a 1.3% drop over the past 24 hours. Meanwhile, Ethereum (ETH) and Solana (SOL) both saw a 2% decrease. In the same period, approximately 118,000 leveraged traders faced liquidations amounting to $405 million. Additionally, Bitcoin ETFs witnessed $163.5 million in outflows on Tuesday, breaking a seven-day streak of inflows.

data.title: German Chancellor Merz Urges Hungarian Prime Minister to Honor Ukraine Loan Agreement
data.description: German Chancellor Merz has emphasized the importance of Hungarian Prime Minister Orban adhering to the agreement concerning loans to Ukraine. According to Jin10, Merz warned that failure to comply with the agreement could harm the overall image of the European Union. The statement underscores the ongoing tensions within the EU regarding financial support to Ukraine amid its geopolitical challenges. The call for compliance highlights the EU's commitment to maintaining unity and upholding its agreements in the face of external pressures.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Gold Faces Largest Weekly Drop in Six Years Amid Middle East Conflict
data.description: Gold is experiencing its most significant weekly decline in six years as the Middle East conflict drives energy prices higher and dampens expectations for interest rate cuts. According to Jin10, spot gold hovered around $4,650 per ounce on Friday, marking a weekly drop of over 7%, the largest since March 2020. The surge in oil and natural gas prices, triggered by the conflict, has intensified inflation concerns, reducing the likelihood of interest rate cuts by central banks, which negatively impacts gold, an asset that does not yield interest. Gold has been on a downward trend for several weeks following the U.S.-Israel attack on Iran late last month.

data.title: Unilever in Talks to Merge Food Business with McCormick
data.description: Unilever is reportedly in discussions to separate its food division and merge it with spice manufacturer McCormick. Wall Street Journal (Markets) posted on X, citing sources familiar with the situation. The potential deal aims to streamline Unilever's operations by focusing on its core personal care and beauty products, while McCormick could benefit from an expanded product portfolio. The talks are still in the early stages, and no final decision has been made. Both companies have yet to comment on the matter.

data.title: Buy Ratings on S&P 500 Companies Rise Over Eight Months
data.description: The percentage of Buy ratings for companies listed on the S&P 500 index has seen an upward trend over the past eight months, reaching 58.2% as of today. FactSet posted on X, highlighting this increase in positive analyst sentiment towards these companies. This trend indicates growing confidence among analysts in the financial performance and potential of S&P 500 companies. The rise in Buy ratings suggests that analysts are optimistic about the earnings prospects and overall market conditions for these firms. This development is noteworthy for investors and market watchers, as it reflects a shift in market sentiment and could influence investment strategies.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 640 USDT with a 1.86% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 19, 2026, 22:36 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 640 USDT and is now trading at 639.52002 USDT, with a narrowed 1.86% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: AI TRENDS | OpenAI President Temporarily Takes Charge of Application Transformation
data.description: OpenAI President Greg Brockman has been appointed to temporarily oversee the transformation of applications, according to Jin10. This move comes as the company seeks to enhance its application offerings and improve user experience. Brockman's leadership is expected to drive innovation and streamline processes within OpenAI's application development. The decision highlights OpenAI's commitment to maintaining its competitive edge in the rapidly evolving AI industry.

data.title: AI TRENDS | OpenAI Plans Desktop 'Super App' to Enhance User Experience
data.description: OpenAI is reportedly taking steps to simplify user experience by planning the launch of a desktop 'super app,' according to Jin10. This new application aims to integrate Codex, ChatGPT, and a browser, offering a more streamlined and cohesive platform for users. The initiative reflects OpenAI's ongoing efforts to enhance accessibility and functionality across its AI tools. By consolidating these features into a single application, OpenAI seeks to provide users with a more efficient and user-friendly interface, potentially broadening the appeal and usability of its AI technologies.

data.title: Iran's Revolutionary Guards: Missile and Drone Strikes Target Israel and U.S. Bases
data.description: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps (IRGC) announced the launch of the 66th phase of the 'Real Commitment-4' military operation, targeting central and southern Israel as well as U.S. military bases in the Middle East. According to Jin10, the operation involved the use of various heavy multi-warhead missiles and drones. The strikes were carried out in the early hours of March 20, local time. The IRGC's statement highlights the ongoing tensions in the region, with Iran demonstrating its military capabilities through these coordinated attacks.

data.title: Brazilian Truck Drivers Decide Against Strike, Union Confirms
data.description: Brazilian truck drivers have opted not to proceed with a strike, according to the transportation union CNTTL. The decision comes amid ongoing discussions about working conditions and economic pressures faced by the drivers. According to Jin10, the union emphasized the importance of dialogue and negotiation to address the concerns of its members. The announcement is expected to ease tensions in the logistics sector, which plays a crucial role in Brazil's economy. The union continues to advocate for improved conditions and fair treatment for truck drivers across the country.

data.title: JPMorgan Chase: Hyperliquid gains popularity due to its support for 24/7 crude oil trading.
data.description: JPMorgan Chase reports that the decentralized exchange Hyperliquid is attracting a growing number of non-crypto traders, particularly those seeking exposure to crude oil prices outside of trading hours. The report notes that during the recent weekend of escalating tensions in the Middle East, traditional markets (such as the CME) were closed, while trading volume on Hyperliquid's WTI crude oil perpetual contracts surged. Daily trading volume for this contract reached approximately $1.7 billion, with open interest around $300 million, making it the platform's third-largest trading instrument after Bitcoin and Ethereum. Priced in USDC and supporting up to 20x leverage, the product is attractive to traders seeking efficient exposure. JPMorgan Chase believes that the growth of platforms like Hyperliquid reflects a rising demand for 24/7 trading of traditional assets. Unlike DEXs that rely on Automated Market Makers (AMMs), Hyperliquid uses an on-chain order book model, offering more precise pricing, lower slippage, and a trading experience closer to that of traditional exchanges.

data.title: Hong Kong ADRs Experience Decline Following Alibaba's Earnings Miss
data.description: Hong Kong's American Depositary Receipts (ADRs) generally saw a downward trend. According to RTHK, Alibaba's recent quarterly earnings fell significantly short of expectations, leading to a substantial sell-off in its ADRs, which dropped over 7% compared to the previous day's closing price in Hong Kong, translating to HKD 122.3. JD Group, Tencent, Xiaomi, and Meituan ADRs also experienced declines ranging from nearly 1% to over 2.5%. Financial stocks showed mixed results, with ADRs for Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing and Bank of China falling by nearly 1% or more, while HSBC and Ping An ADRs remained stable. Meanwhile, China Construction Bank ADRs rose over 1%, translating to HKD 8.2. Edited by Fang Jiali.

data.title: Oil Prices Experience Significant Fluctuations
data.description: Oil prices have experienced significant volatility, with a sharp rise followed by a decline. According to RTHK, the May contract for London Brent crude oil initially surged nearly 11%, reaching $119.13 per barrel, approaching a more than three-and-a-half-year high set earlier last week. Brent crude settled at $108.65, marking an increase of approximately 1.2%. Meanwhile, the April contract for New York crude oil briefly surpassed $100, rising over 5% to $101.48 before closing at $96.14, reflecting a decrease of about 0.2%.

data.title: Senate Republicans Push for Progress on Digital Asset Market Clarity Act
data.description: Senate Republicans convened on Thursday to address remaining issues in the Digital Asset Market Clarity Act, aiming to advance the bill to a hearing. According to NS3.AI, stablecoin yield and decentralized finance (DeFi) continue to be major points of contention. Meanwhile, the White House was anticipated to receive revised legislative language on the same day. Democrats are advocating for restrictions on personal cryptocurrency profits by lawmakers and senior officials, as well as new appointments to the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) before the agency implements crypto regulations.

data.title: Netanyahu: Israel will "suspend" airstrikes on Iranian energy facilities
data.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, answering questions from the media at a press conference on the 19th, stated that Israel had "solely" launched airstrikes on Iranian gas fields and that Israel would "comply" with US President Trump's demand to "suspend" further airstrikes on energy facilities. Earlier that day, Trump, answering questions from the media at the White House, stated that he had told Netanyahu not to attack energy facilities inside Iran.
